display.name: Image Mosaic
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Tessellated image tiles that pulse, scale, and offset on beats.

annotation.technical_notes: A structured grid of repeating blocks is modulated by a per-pixel warp shader, creating a domain repetition effect where cell corners pinch into sharp teal and brown star-like shapes. The overall brightness and scale of the grid are heavily gated by the bass frequencies of the synthetic test signal, causing the pattern to collapse into a dark, flat mosaic during quiet passages and expand during peak transients. The rendering relies on a custom composition shader that masks and sharpens the grid boundaries based on audio-driven variables.
